originalTitle: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison for firing a gun
title: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison for firing a gun
content: Malema is appealing against the decision, which means he is not going to prison immediately.

originalTitle: Pope lashes out at foreigners who exploit Africa
title: Pope lashes out at foreigners who exploit Africa
content: The pontiff has been unusually forthright during his visit to conflict-hit Cameroon.

originalTitle: Wanted activist arrested in South Africa over support for Benin coup plot
title: Wanted activist arrested in South Africa over support for Benin coup plot
content: Keba Seba is known for opposing French influence in Africa and backing West Africa's military leaders.

originalTitle: UK’s Starmer under fire over report Mandelson failed security vetting
title: UK’s Starmer under fire over report Mandelson failed security vetting
content: Gov's spokesperson says Starmer had no knowledge of the Foreign Office overriding the security recommendation.

originalTitle: Displaced Lebanese in Beirut uncertain if they can trust ceasefire
title: Displaced Lebanese in Beirut uncertain if they can trust ceasefire
content: Displaced Lebanese in Beirut said they do not yet trust whether the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will hold.

originalTitle: Sectarian fears increase as a Beirut area says no to displacement centre
title: Sectarian fears increase as a Beirut area says no to displacement centre
content: Tensions rise in Karantina as civil war-era sectarian fears resurface over a cancelled displacement centre project.

originalTitle: Israel and Lebanon agree 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
title: Israel and Lebanon agree 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
content: The US president invites the two countries' leaders to Washington as Israel's prime minister insists troops will not leave southern Lebanon.

originalTitle: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
content: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.

originalTitle: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings
title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings
content: At least 16 people were injured in a shooting at a high school on Tuesday, before another nine were killed in a separate school shooting on Wednesday.

originalTitle: Ex-keeper Manninger dies after car hit by train
title: Ex-keeper Manninger dies after car hit by train
content: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies at the age of 48 after his car is struck by a train.

originalTitle: Barca say refereeing 'errors' cost them Champions League semi-final spot
title: Barca say refereeing 'errors' cost them Champions League semi-final spot
content: Barcelona say refereeing "errors" cost them a place in the semi-finals of the Champions League, and have caused "significant sporting and financial harm to the club".

originalTitle: Italy made me a manager when England 'discouraged' me - Cole
title: Italy made me a manager when England 'discouraged' me - Cole
content: Ashley Cole won 107 caps for England, seventh on the all‑time list, but says he was "discouraged" by those in the football pyramid from becoming a head coach.
